validation.emptyStructure: OKR structure must have at least 1 Objective.

validation.emptyKR: Objective "{{title}}" must have at least 1 Key Result (KR).
validation.negativeChildMax: Max score of "{{title}}" must not be negative.
validation.negativeChildUnit: Points/Unit of "{{title}}" must not be negative.
validation.unitExceedsObjMax: Points/Unit of Criteria "{{childTitle}}" ({{childScore}}) must not exceed Max Score of Objective "{{objTitle}}" ({{objScore}}).
validation.childrenExceedParent: Total max score of children under "{{title}}" ({{childTotal}}) must not exceed max score of "{{title}}" ({{parentMax}}).
validation.childrenBelowParent: Total max score of children under "{{title}}" ({{childTotal}}) must not be less than max score of "{{title}}" ({{parentMax}}) (must equal exactly {{parentMax}}).
validation.totalNot100: Total max score (maxScore) of all Objectives must equal exactly 100. Currently it is {{total}}.
